_comment: Commander roster for the prototype. C6 dead-code sweep (2026-05-02) removed legacy commander-a..e entries; the 3 locked civ commanders (Leonidas / Montezuma II / Ragnar Lothbrok) are now the only roster entries. Locked names per decisions/2026-04-25-q2-real-cultures-direction-ratified.md (Hard reversibility); locked signature-ability names from same — do NOT rename without a new dated decision. Identity-floor fields (passive/signature/long-CD names, 12-line VO bank shape, 20-level XP ladder, 3 cosmetic slots L5/L10/L15) preserved per decisions/2026-04-20-commander-identity-floor.md. All numbers [PROPOSAL] until balance pass. Port target: Godot 4 Resource array (res://data/commanders/*.tres).

leonidas.name: Leonidas
leonidas.lore: "The line is held by men who chose to die at it. Spartan training is not a regimen — it is a covenant. When the wall breaks, I am the wall."

montezuma-ii.name: Montezuma II
montezuma-ii.lore: "The sun is fed by tribute. The tribute is paid in blood. The blood is mine to weigh, and the gods are mine to answer. The Great Sacrifice is not a cost — it is the bargain that lets the next dawn come."

ragnar-lothbrok.name: Ragnar Lothbrok
ragnar-lothbrok.lore: "My sons are my line. The mead hall sings their names before they are born. Berserk is not madness — it is honesty. The Great Heathen Army is what arrives when honesty is shared."

pick: [VO] The longships are at the strand.
